events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. The sequence shows no violation — preparatory steps (raceway rough-in, hold points) were completed and signed before wire pulling began, materials are staged correctly, and no steps were skipped. Decision: **pass**, risk **low**, with a note to verify conductor identification per NEC 200.6/210.5 as pulling continues toward termination.
